low_confidence_message: Our models are not confident enough about this image. Please try again with better lighting and a clearer photo.

clear.explanation: Your skin appears clear with no significant acne.
clear.educational_note: Clear skin still benefits from a consistent routine: gentle cleanser, moisturizer, and SPF daily.

mild.explanation: Mild acne detected — a few small blemishes or comedones.

recommendations.reason: Unclogs pores and reduces mild breakouts
Reduces inflammation and regulates sebum
Keeps skin clean without stripping the moisture barrier

mild.educational_note: Mild acne is very common and responds well to consistent over-the-counter treatments. Avoid picking at blemishes.

moderate.explanation: Moderate acne detected — multiple visible blemishes or inflamed spots.

recommendations.reason: Kills acne-causing bacteria and reduces inflammation
Increases cell turnover and prevents clogged pores
Calms inflammation and strengthens skin barrier
Hydrates without clogging pores

moderate.educational_note: Moderate acne benefits from a targeted routine. Introduce active ingredients one at a time. If no improvement in 6-8 weeks, consider consulting a dermatologist.

severe.explanation: Severe acne detected — widespread inflammation and/or deep blemishes.

recommendations.reason: Strong antibacterial for severe breakouts
Prescription-strength retinoid available OTC, reduces severe acne
Anti-inflammatory and antibacterial, helps with post-acne marks
Severe acne needs gentle cleansing to avoid further irritation

severe.educational_note: Severe acne often requires professional guidance. These recommendations can help while you seek a dermatologist consultation. Avoid harsh scrubs and over-washing.

oily.explanation: Your skin type appears to be oily — producing excess sebum.

recommendations.reason: Regulates oil production and minimizes pores
Hydrates without adding oiliness
Absorbs excess oil and deep-cleans pores

oily.educational_note: Oily skin is actually less prone to premature aging. Don't over-strip — your skin will produce MORE oil to compensate.

dry.explanation: Your skin type appears to be dry — lacking moisture and potentially flaky.

recommendations.reason: Draws moisture into the skin for deep hydration
Repairs and strengthens the moisture barrier
Cleanses without stripping natural oils

dry.educational_note: Dry skin needs hydration AND moisture. Hyaluronic acid pulls water in, ceramides lock it in. Avoid hot water and harsh soaps.

normal.explanation: Your skin type appears balanced — normal hydration levels.

recommendations.reason: Antioxidant protection and brightening for already healthy skin
Protects your naturally balanced skin from sun damage
Maintains your skin's natural balance

normal.educational_note: Normal skin is well-balanced. Focus on maintenance and prevention — sunscreen is your best anti-aging investment.

combination.explanation: Your skin type appears to be combination — oily in some areas, dry in others.

recommendations.reason: Balances oil production in T-zone without drying other areas
Hydrates dry areas without overwhelming oily zones
Targets oily T-zone pores without over-drying cheeks

combination.educational_note: Combination skin benefits from zone-specific treatment. Apply richer products on dry areas and lighter formulas on the oily T-zone.

healthy.educational_note: Your skin looks healthy! Maintain your routine with cleanser, moisturizer, and SPF.

blackheads.explanation: Blackheads (open comedones) detected — clogged pores with oxidized sebum.

recommendations.reason: Oil-soluble BHA that penetrates and unclogs pores from within
Dissolves sebum plugs without irritation (oil dissolves oil)
Increases cell turnover to prevent pore clogging

blackheads.educational_note: Blackheads form when pores fill with sebum that oxidizes (turns dark). Don't squeeze — use chemical exfoliation instead. Results take 4-6 weeks.

recommendations.reason: Inhibits melanin production and fades existing spots
Gentle brightening agent that reduces pigmentation over time
Essential — sun exposure darkens existing spots and creates new ones
Prevents melanin transfer to skin surface

dark_spots.educational_note: Dark spots are caused by excess melanin production (sun, acne scars, hormones). Sunscreen is non-negotiable — without it, treatments won't work.

recommendations.reason: Clinically proven to minimize pore appearance
Cleans out pore contents, making them appear smaller
Increases collagen around pores, tightening their appearance

pores.educational_note: Pore size is largely genetic, but their APPEARANCE can be minimized. Keeping pores clean and building collagen around them makes them look smaller.

recommendations.reason: Gold standard for wrinkle reduction — increases collagen production
Signals skin to produce more collagen and elastin
Plumps skin and fills fine lines with hydration
UV is the #1 cause of premature wrinkles

wrinkles.educational_note: Wrinkles form from collagen breakdown (UV, aging, repetitive movements). Retinol and sunscreen together are the most effective anti-aging combination backed by research.
